hypotheses.interpretation: Recursive thought beats a parameter-matched flat baseline when the stopping confound is removed.
The edge-token Transformer catches up, weakening the architecture claim.
Self-loop stabilization materially improves final-step OOD accuracy, confirming that stopping/answer retention was a confound.
Curriculum does not materially improve OOD composition.
One-step retrieval is comparable, so recursion may not be the key factor on this task.
The advantage does not clearly survive harder structural variants.
A learned halting head can use recursive states to select the answer step.
